arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest's Anthony Elanga names four Chelsea danger players for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Anthony Elanga, the former Manchester United winger now playing for Nottingham Forest, is hoping to recreate last season's shock 1-0 victory at Stamford Bridge when they face Chelsea again. Elanga, who scored his first goal for Forest in that game, has become an important player for Forest following his £15m move in August 2024.

arts.ttl: Chelsea face Real Madrid battle for HUGE target
arts.sum: Real Madrid are "closely monitoring" Aston Villa's Jhon Duran, according to reports. Duran helped Villa clinch a 1-0 win over Bayern Munich on Wednesday, with his 79th-minute goal being the difference.
